summary: Iteration 6: Tested 3 new features - Export CSV/PDF (CommunicationsPage), Email Template Library (ComposePage), and Coach Call Notes (CollegeDetailPage). All 5 backend endpoints return 401 without auth (5/5 passed). Code review confirms all UI elements have correct data-testid attributes and feature logic is correct. Full OAuth login required to test authenticated flows.
critical_code_review_comments: ComposePage.js imports BookTemplate from lucide-react but it's unused (only BookMarked is used). Non-breaking but a minor cleanup opportunity.
test_credentials: Google OAuth only - cannot automate full flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 complete. Features verified: (1) CommunicationsPage: exportCSV() and exportPDF() both client-side, buttons data-testid='export-csv-btn'/'export-pdf-btn' disabled when filtered.length===0. (2) ComposePage: templates-toggle-btn loads GET /api/templates, save-template-btn (data-testid) visible only when draft exists and toggles inline form, template-name-input in form, handleSaveTemplate posts to POST /api/templates. (3) CollegeDetailPage: call-notes-section (data-testid) visible when tracked=true, date input data-testid='call-note-date', textarea data-testid='call-note-input', button data-testid='add-call-note-btn'. All 5 new backend endpoints auth-protected. Backend tests in test_iteration6_features.py.
